race.comment: RAGGA RAGGA (10) looks well placed coming back to this level after contesting metro races for the majority of her career. Only 11 starts in with one win to her name, she makes plenty of appeal here with McDougall on from an inside barrier. Can sit handy and end her winning drought. SUTTON VELLA (9) is building nicely and is the weight horse in this event, dropping 7.5kg from her last run where she was only 1.5L off the winner. Penza takes the ride today and with a good tempo expected, she'll be in this for a very long way. IOWNA BENZ (4) is a speedy horse who pulled up with an issue at Orange last time out. She has enough speed to get across from the draw and she's been given plenty of time to recover from that effort. Best form is good enough to take this out. TEYLU (3) is better than he showed last start and can improve.
